name: JBG SMITH Properties
business: JBG SMITH Properties owns, operates, and develops mixed-use properties concentrated in Washington, D.C. metro submarkets, primarily National Landing. It also provides fee-based third-party real estate services including property management, leasing, and development. The company generates rental revenue from office, multifamily, and retail tenants, as well as service fees from third-party clients.

exposures.sentence: We expect the defense industry's focus on both innovative new technology and weapons systems to drive demand to Northern Virginia, specifically National Landing, given the massive concentration of contractors located there.
In January 2025, the first academic building opened, which includes Virginia Tech's Institute for Advanced Computing.

The risk of a cyber incident or disruption, including by computer hackers, foreign governments and cyber terrorists, has generally increased as the number, intensity and sophistication of attempted attacks have increased globally.
As of December 31, 2025, our Operating Portfolio consisted of 39 operating assets comprising 15 multifamily assets totaling 6,519 units (6,333 units at our share).

We continue to implement our comprehensive plan to reposition our holdings in National Landing by executing a broad array of Placemaking strategies, including the delivery of new multifamily assets and redeveloped office assets.

catalysts.event: Completion of office amenity hub at 2011 Crystal Drive
catalysts.sentence: In the first half of 2026, we expect to complete construction on a new office amenity hub at 2011 Crystal Drive that, along with a repositioning of the asset itself, brings to National Landing a large-scale externally managed meeting and conference facility, two elevated food and beverage offerings, and an activated public lobby.
